zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Chesney於大約1100年出生在英國時，她的父親Roger de Chesney22歲，母親Alice Langetot28歲。她和Robert Foliot I至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1148年享年49歲。

zh-hans.Upper Heyford, Oxfordshire, England: 英国奧可福爾武坡 海易福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Chesney于大约1100年出生在英国时，她的父亲Roger de Chesney22岁，母亲Alice Langetot28岁。她和Robert Foliot I至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1148年享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chesney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Antrim, Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh, see McChesney .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Chaney  , a cognate of 3 below.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’). Compare Cheney 2.

variants.name: McChesney
meanings: Scottish (Galloway) and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh ‘son of the Saxon (i.e. the Englishman)’. The spelling seems to represent Mac Shasanaigh, to be pronounced originally as McHasney, rather than the English spelling ch.

variants.name: Chestnut
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire and Lanarkshire) and northern Irish: altered form of Chesney , shortened from McChesney . Its assimilation to the English word chestnut is due to folk etymology, the word itself being first recorded in 1519. The surname was probably taken to Ireland at the time of the 17th-century Plantation of Ulster.
English (Norfolk): probably a variant of Chestney (see Chaney ), altered by folk etymological association with the word chestnut.

variants.name: Chesna
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Chesney  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Chesney was born about 1100, in England, her father, Roger de Chesney, was 22 and her mother, Alice Langetot, was 28. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Robert Foliot I. She died in 1148, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Chesney est née environ 1100, à Angleterre, son père, Roger de Chesney, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alice Langetot, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Robert Foliot I. Elle est décédée en 1148, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Chesney um 1100 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Chesney 22 und ihre Mutter Alice Langetot 28. Sie hatte mit Robert Foliot I mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1148 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Chesney è nata il circa 1100 nel England, sua padre, Roger de Chesney, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Alice Langetot, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Robert Foliot I. Morì nel 1148, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイア

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Chesneyが約1100年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Roger de Chesneyは22歳，母Alice Langetotは28歳であった。彼女はRobert Foliot Iとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1148年に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Chesney(이)가 대략 1100년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Chesney(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Langetot(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Robert Foliot I(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1148년 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Chesney nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Chesney, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Alice Langetot, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Robert Foliot I. Ela faleceu em 1148, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Chesney родилась около 1100 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Chesney было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Langetot, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Robert Foliot I. Она умерла в 1148 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

sm.from 25 December 1109 to 1142: mai le 25 Tesema 1109 e o'o I le 1142

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Chesney nació aproximadamente 1100, en Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Chesney, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Alice Langetot, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Robert Foliot I. Murió en 1148, a la edad de 49 años.
